hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.go) "$(go env GOPATH)/bin/goimports" -w "$f" ;; */frontend/*) case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.css|*.json) repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && (cd "$repo_root/frontend" && npx --no-install prettier --write "$f") ;; esac ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
